title: clerodendrum aculeatum
intro: Clerodendrum aculeatum, also known as the thorny glorybower or thorny potato flower, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family characterized by its thorny stems and clusters of small, fragrant flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum aculeatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves, roots, or flowers, and are often consumed as teas, infusions, or used in topical applications.
